alt_text: A woman in a black dress views her back, standing before a colorful abstract painting on an exposed brick wall with a diagonal shaft of light.
caption: the art critiqued my choices back

alt_text: A woman in a white shirt and shorts stands smiling in front of a large painting of a red-orange gradient sky framed in an arch, against a textured wall.
caption: i came for the art, stayed to be the main character

alt_text: A woman in profile wearing an oversized white shirt over a black dress stands against a textured concrete wall with streaks of light and shadow.
caption: wearing his shirt like it's an apology he never sent

alt_text: A woman in a gray bikini and black cap smiles on a sandy beach with turquoise water and boats in the background.
caption: vacation body, situationship budget

alt_text: A woman in a strapless black top and white skirt sits by an infinity pool at sunset, smiling and touching her hair, with glowing orb sculptures and the sea in the background.
caption: sunsets are free, my attention is not

alt_text: A woman in a white tank top and long skirt stands smiling on a beach at sunset with waves and the sun low over the horizon behind her.
caption: chasing the sunset since he wouldn't chase me

alt_text: A woman in a white tank top wearing a black cap embroidered with 'i'm single' smiles at the camera in a sunlit room.
caption: single is a personality now, not a phase

alt_text: A woman wearing a black cap that says 'i'm single' and a white tank top, smiling with her arm raised near a window.
caption: cap already said it so i don't have to

alt_text: A smiling woman in a black cap and white outfit stands in front of the Louvre Abu Dhabi's dome and reflecting pool under a clear blue sky.
caption: flew to abu dhabi to avoid one man's texts

alt_text: A woman in a white strapless top and pants, black cap, leans on a railing by the sea with a city skyline in the background.
caption: left him on read, the sea on livestream

alt_text: A woman in a black cap and white outfit sits on a waterfront terrace near a museum, smiling back over her shoulder.
caption: booked a whole city just to get over one guy

alt_text: A smiling woman wearing a cap that says 'i'm single' and a striped shirt over a white top, standing near a bicycle by a street pole.
caption: found the pole before i found the one

alt_text: A woman wearing a gray cap embroidered with 'i'm single' and a striped shirt smiles while riding a bicycle on a cobblestone street.
caption: riding solo, the bike's the only thing i'm committed to

alt_text: A woman in a gray tank top smiles while holding a black coffee cup on a rooftop balcony with the Berlin TV tower and cityscape behind her.
caption: new city, same coffee dependency, zero new personality

alt_text: A woman in a gray halter top smiles while holding a black coffee cup, with the Berlin TV tower and a passing train visible behind her.
caption: new city, new skyline, still emotionally unavailable

alt_text: A woman with a short bob takes a selfie in a blue puff-sleeve top on an office mezzanine with railings and plants in the background.
caption: dressed like i have my life together. i don't.

alt_text: A smiling woman in a gray cap reading 'i'm single' holds a bottle of Geroisteiner water on a cobblestone street.
caption: hydrating so my glow outlasts my situationships

alt_text: A woman in a bikini top and denim shorts, wearing a black cap and heart-shaped sunglasses, sits on a wooden boat deck by a lily-covered lake, smiling over her shoulder.
caption: docked the boat, still can't dock a relationship

alt_text: A woman in a gray cap that says 'i'm single' and a light blue bikini smiles on a boat near dark rippling water.
caption: single on land, single on water, consistent at least

alt_text: A woman in glasses and a gray zip-up hoodie takes a downward selfie on a cobblestone street, holding a white geometric handbag.
caption: cobblestones don't judge me, but the algorithm will

alt_text: A woman wearing a gray cap that says 'i'm single' smiles with her eyes closed while holding a wine bottle in a mirrored elevator.
caption: wine in one hand, hard pass in the other

alt_text: A man wearing a cap that says 'i'm single' smokes a cigarette while making a face at an outdoor party.
caption: the wedding ring's a prop, the cap's the truth

alt_text: A man wearing a gray cap that says 'i'm single' holds a cigarette while standing at an outdoor party.
caption: wearing the ring for the bit, wearing the cap for the truth

alt_text: A man in a black t-shirt wears a gray cap reading 'i'm single' while smoking a cigarette at an outdoor party.
caption: cap says single, ring says lies, cigarette says whatever

alt_text: A mustached man in a black t-shirt and a cap reading 'i'm single' gives two thumbs up outdoors among trees and people.
caption: two thumbs up for the worst decision of her life

alt_text: A man with a mustache wears a black cap embroidered with 'i'm single' and a black t-shirt, standing outdoors near a tripod and other people at what appears to be a casual gathering.
caption: the cap already outed me before i could lie about it

alt_text: A man wearing a gray cap embroidered with 'i'm single' smiles and looks down while standing outdoors among a crowd of people near trees and a building.
caption: grinning like single isn't already printed on my head

alt_text: A mustached man in a black tank top and a gray cap that reads 'i'm single' smiles widely at an outdoor gathering with other people in the background.
caption: the happiest men are single or lying

alt_text: A woman wearing a motorcycle helmet with a built-in visor cap smiles and gives a peace sign outside a building.
caption: safety first, standards later, peace sign forever

alt_text: A woman in a beige cap and brown bodycon dress smiles while taking a mirror selfie in a fitting room.
caption: trying on the dress, keeping the trust issues

alt_text: A woman in a yellow tank top, cream cardigan, and beige cap smiles while taking a mirror selfie in an elevator showing floor 23.
caption: 23 floors up and still going down on my standards

alt_text: A woman in a white dress sips a beer on a riverside rooftop terrace at sunset, with Wat Arun temple visible across the water in Bangkok.
caption: flew across the world, still doing my own emotional labor

alt_text: A woman in sunglasses and a white shirt over a beige dress smiles on a boat with limestone cliffs and the sea behind her.
caption: booked the boat trip so my delusion could have scenery

alt_text: A woman in a cap and white shirt sits on a boat looking out at turquoise water and green cliffs.
caption: the ocean's calm. my situationship isn't. one of us evolved.

alt_text: A woman in a white sarong sits by an infinity pool on a wooden deck surrounded by jungle and a resort villa.
caption: the villa's five stars. the situationship's still one.

alt_text: A woman lies on a canopy daybed with her legs up against a cushion, facing floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking lush tropical greenery.
caption: booked a jungle view so my red flags could breathe

alt_text: A woman in a light backless dress stands on a beach facing the ocean during a colorful sunset.
caption: walked toward the ocean like it texted back first

alt_text: Two women in bikini tops and shorts stand on a boat pointing toward the Berlin TV Tower while others sit nearby on the dock.
caption: pointed at the tallest thing in berlin, still not him
